EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.name} modified the service account "{object.account.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} failed to delete a service account on host {event_src.host}. Reason: "{reason}".
The user {subject.name} failed to view information about service accounts on host {event_src.host}. Reason: "{reason}".
The user {subject.name} failed to create a service account on host {event_src.host}. Reason: "{reason}".
The user {subject.name} failed to modify a service account on host {event_src.host}. Reason: "{reason}".
The user {subject.name} deleted service accounts on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} is viewing information about service accounts on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} is viewing information about the service account "{object.account.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} deleted the service account "{object.account.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} is modifying the service account "{object.account.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} viewed information about service accounts on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} viewed information about the service account "{object.account.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} is deleting service accounts on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} is creating the service account "{object.account.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} failed to view information about the service account "{object.account.name}" on host {event_src.host}. Reason: "{reason}".
The user {subject.name} failed to delete service accounts on host {event_src.host}. Reason: "{reason}".
The user {subject.name} is deleting the service account "{object.account.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.name} created the service account "{object.account.name}" on host {event_src.host}
